title: phleum asperum subsp. annuum
intro: Phleum asperum subsp. annuum, also known as rough meadow-grass or annual blue grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Phleum asperum subsp. annuum include its ability to treat various respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of Phleum asperum subsp. annuum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
